title: 存储信息
completionRule: Complete only when every legacy path/size field and empty state, the frozen book/page/resource-storage scope, shared GUI/CLI/TUI DTO, lazy lifecycle, responsive geometry and bounded diagnostics behavior have automated evidence.

sourceUiInventory.title: 字节格式边界
acceptanceItems: 小于 1024 显示整数 B

sourceUiInventory.title: 空数据与元数据生命周期
acceptanceItems: imageInfo 为空时字段零 DOM
居中显示暂无存储信息
翻页更新当前页面路径与大小
迟到元数据不得覆盖当前页

sourceUiInventory.title: 通用 Card 外壳与布局状态
acceptanceItems: HardDrive 图标与存储信息标题
动态 import 加载与失败状态

sourceUiInventory.title: 共享页面与书源存储契约
acceptanceItems: 当前页面实际字节大小
归档条目使用条目大小而非外层压缩包大小
文件页使用文件 stat fallback
书源文件大小单独表达
文件夹书源大小保持未知
同一 generation 请求去重
取消与 session 关闭释放

sourceUiInventory.title: XR 资源占用扩展
acceptanceItems: 资源占用与旧路径/大小字段分组
缩略图内存缓存字节数
固态归档缓存保留字节数
不可用资源指标显示 em dash
采样有界且 Card 隐藏时零轮询
全局资源指标明确标记为 XR 扩展

items.title: 显示当前页面规范存储路径
items.targetContract: The Card renders the current page display path, preserving an archive entry identity instead of substituting an editable input or unrelated book source.
items.notes: page.displayPath remains distinct from book.sourcePath; archive entries and filesystem pages retain their canonical display identity.

items.title: 显示当前页面实际字节大小
items.targetContract: The current page byte length uses entry metadata or filesystem stat fallback without decoding image content.
items.notes: Archive entry and filesystem page sizes use the shared page byteLength and never substitute the outer book source size.

items.title: 单独显示书源文件大小
items.targetContract: XR separately exposes the opened archive/document/media source file size while directory-backed books remain unknown.
items.notes: The HTTP metadata contract stats file-backed book sources; directory books degrade to unknown and headless surfaces keep local source paths redacted.

items.title: 显示有界缓存与资源占用
items.targetContract: The Card exposes bounded presentation-memory, thumbnail-memory, solid-archive and presentation-disk cache bytes from the shared diagnostics snapshot without starting a second sampler.
items.notes: The four metrics come from the existing versioned diagnostics service and are visually separated from the legacy fields.

items.title: 保持 1024 进制字节格式
items.targetContract: Missing values render an em dash, zero renders 0 B, bytes remain integral and KiB-range labels preserve the legacy KB/MB/GB labels with two decimals.
items.notes: Dedicated boundaries cover invalid, zero, 1023, 1024, MiB and GiB values.

items.title: 加载、空、错误与重试
items.targetContract: The Card has stable loading, empty, partial-metric, error and retry states and never shows stale page storage data as current.
items.notes: Diagnostics failure leaves legacy metadata visible; loading/error/retry are accessible target extensions.

items.title: 共享 Card 外壳行为
items.targetContract: The Storage Card remains independently lazy, dockable, hideable, collapsible, movable, resizable and window-capable through the shared shell.
items.notes: Storage builds as an independent 3557-byte deferred chunk and keeps the shared shell contract.

items.title: 共享有界存储与诊断 DTO
items.targetContract: GUI, CLI and TUI share bounded page/book byte identities and a versioned diagnostics snapshot with cancellation and unavailable-field semantics.
items.notes: The shared diagnostics DTO is path-free and metric-only; page bytes remain on the existing bounded reader snapshot.

items.title: 懒加载、去重、取消与释放
items.targetContract: Hidden or collapsed Cards do no work; metadata is shared per generation; diagnostics are fetched once on activation and cancellation/disposal prevents stale publication.
items.notes: Storage has no polling loop; the single activation request aborts on unmount and E2E observes exactly one diagnostics request.

items.title: 仅持久化共享 Card 布局
items.targetContract: Storage content has no settings; panel/order/visible/expanded/height persist only through canonical [nodes.neoview] layout.
items.notes: No storage sample or resource snapshot is persisted to xiranite.db or a second NeoView database.

items.title: 语义字段与键盘等价操作
items.targetContract: The Card uses grouped semantic description data; shell and retry controls have keyboard operation and accessible names.
items.notes: Description groups, named resource heading and a native retry button provide the target keyboard and screen-reader contract.

items.title: 桌面与窄 Card 视觉几何
items.targetContract: Legacy two-row density, labels, monospace wrapping and the separated XR resource group remain readable at desktop and 420x360 Card widths.
items.notes: Desktop and 420x360 Chromium assert zero Card overflow and capture the rendered Card.

items.title: 常量 DOM、共享请求与独立 chunk
items.targetContract: O(1) DOM, one metadata request per session generation, one activation diagnostics request, zero hidden work and a deferred Storage Card chunk under 8 KiB.
items.notes: Storage chunk is 3557 bytes; the Card performs no decode, directory scan, thumbnail blob read or polling.

items.title: 记录书源大小与资源占用扩展
items.targetContract: Document that separate book size, diagnostics metrics, loading/error/retry and semantic groups are intentional additions while the legacy path/size rows remain intact.
items.notes: Legacy path and size remain the first group; book size and shared resource diagnostics are explicitly labeled target extensions.
